commands.review_summary:
The PR generates agent-scoped mcporter config for QMD memory searches, preserves configured mcporter server definitions, parses log-prefixed mcporter JSON, expands QMD tests, and changes QQBot token fetching to use the SSRF guard.

PR surface: Source +225, Tests +443, Other -1. Total +667 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path for the review findings: the diff unconditionally rewrites the generated mcporter config before calls, and mcporter 0.10.2 treats config mtime drift as stale daemon state; the QQBot diff also visibly omits current-main `capture: false`. I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow repair lane can fix the two concrete blockers without changing product direction or discarding the useful QMD work.
